name: WLF_PROVIDER_BOOKINGS_F
description: Table to store provider bookings information.

columns.Name: PROVIDER_BOOKING_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier.

columns.Name: PROVIDER_BOOKING_NUMBER
columns.Comments: PROVIDER_BOOKING_NUMBER

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: PROVIDER_INSTR_ACCOUNT_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates relation id

columns.Name: PROVIDER_ACCOUNT_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates provider id

columns.Name: BOOKING_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates booking id

columns.Name: PROVIDER_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates provider template id

columns.Name: MEETING_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates meeting id of a provider account

columns.Name: MEETING_URL
columns.Comments: Indicates meeting URL

columns.Name: RECORDING_URLS
columns.Comments: Indicates recording URL

columns.Name: RECORDING_DOWNLOAD_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates wheather download recording option enabled or not

columns.Name: RECORDING_DOWNLOAD_TIME
columns.Comments: Indicates timestamp of download recording

columns.Name: ATTENDANCE_DOWNLOAD_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates wheather download attendance option enabled or not

columns.Name: ATTENDANCE_DOWNLOAD_TIME
columns.Comments: Indicates timestamp of download attendance

columns.Name: AUTO_COMPLETION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether auto completion processing done or not.

columns.Name: AUTO_COMPLETION_TIME
columns.Comments: Indicates timestamp of when auto completion processing done

columns.Name: VILT_STATUS
columns.Comments: Indicates vilt call status

columns.Name: VILT_TIME
columns.Comments: Indicates vilt call timestamp

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
